ab: Piyu, usa miniy ci aguw ungat aguw moṟow ta la.
ch: W:Piyu，家裡沒有米酒了，你去買米酒。
en: Piyu, our home is out of rice wine, please go and buy some.

ab: cel pabitaṟakan kutux susuk na, iya’ biniy hang!
ch: M:廚房裡還有一瓶，不用買吧!
en: There is still one bottle left in the kitchen, so there is no need to buy one!

ab: ini’ tana’ utux susuk, usa’ miniy sa’ing susuk moh su kay.
ch: W:一瓶不夠，再去買兩瓶回來。
en: One bottle is not enough for me, go and buy two more back.

ab: pabiniy cu ci aguw, kelan baninarun mamu?
ch: m:我要買米酒，你們有賣嗎?
en: I am looking for rice wine. Do you have any rice wine?

ab: kelan wa! pira’ ka binarun su?
en: Yes! How many bottles do you need?

ab: sa’ing susuk binarun mu, lu pabiniy cu utux cinnabon na box na.
ch: m:我要買兩瓶，還要買一包米。
en: I want two bottles and a pack of rice.

ab: nel ka box, amol ka babinarun su na?
ch: w:米在這裡，你還需要什麼嗎?
en: Here is the rice, what else do you need?

ab: pabiniy cu ci baṟing na, kelan mamu?
en: I want some eggs too, do you have some?

ab: wal su’un miniy ka baṟing min la.
en: We are out of eggs.

ab: pabiniy cu ci lukus.
en: I want to buy some clothes.

ab: magamol ka gagalun su aṟ?
en: What kind of clothes do you like?

ab: pabiniy cu ci purung uṟit na lukus.
en: I want to buy the clothes with short sleeves.

ab: magamol ka matanah hani?
en: How about this red one?

ab: kelan iro’ lanlamu’ na?
en: Do you have another color?

ab: kelan na malabu’ lu mukaṟal. uṟɨ’.
en: We have white and blue ones too.

ab: bi’i’ cu tutux lukus mukaṟal aw.
ch: m:請給我一件藍色的衣服。
en: Please give me the clothes in blue.

ab: Sapu, minsa su inu’ ci micuw? minsa su ṟumuy ci hi’?
ch: W:Sapu，你剛剛去哪裡了?你去運動嗎?
en: Sapu, where have you been just now? Did you go exercising?

ab: aṟat, minsa cu rumow pabiniy ci ṟagu’ ni yaki mu.
en: No, I went grocery shopping for my grandma.

ab: ux, mahnguw su malahngan? moh su gunluw mani mami’ kinang.
ch: W:這樣啊，你晚上有沒有空?要不要和我一起吃飯。
en: No wonder! Are you available at night? Would you like to have a meal with me?

ab: aṟat cu, maha cu miniy ci lukus.
en: No, I want to buy some clothes.

ab: han misu guluw musa aw?
en: Then, I will go with you.

ab: ramas su, pira’ utux binnahlan ka ragu’ hani?
ch: m:你好，請問這把菜多少錢?
en: Hello, how much is this bunch of vegetables?

ab: mapusal ka utux binahlan ṟagu’ hani.
en: The vegetables are $20 for a bunch.

ab: pira’ ka ngahi’ hani?
en: How much are these sweet potatoes?

ab: matul ka utux toting ngahi’ hani.
en: Sweet potatoes are thirty dollars for a pound.

ab: bi’i’ cu tikiy ci ṟagu’ sa’ing binahlan lu ngahi’ utux toting.
ch: m:請給我兩把菜和一斤地瓜。
en: Please give me two bunches of vegetables and a pound of sweet potatoes.
